page.content: The dataset presents a comprehensive analysis of associations between various psychological traits and cardiovascular measures, with Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Agreeableness, and Conscientiousness as key traits. For SBP_ER (%), the correlation coefficients (rs) are 0.158 for Neuroticism, -0.272 for Extraversion, -0.047 for Openness, -0.055 for Agreeableness, and 0.149 for Conscientiousness, all with p-values of 0.575, 0.327, 0.869, 0.847, and 0.596 respectively. In the case of DBP_ER (%), the rs values are 0.584** for Neuroticism, -0.478* for Extraversion, -0.023 for Openness, -0.271 for Agreeableness, and -0.275 for Conscientiousness, with corresponding p-values of 0.022, 0.072, 0.934, 0.328, and 0.322.

lines.text: The dataset presents a comprehensive analysis of associations between various psychological traits and cardiovascular
measures, with Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Agreeableness, and Conscientiousness as key traits. For SBP_ER (%), the
correlation coefficients (rs) are 0.158 for Neuroticism, -0.272 for Extraversion, -0.047 for Openness, -0.055 for Agreeableness,
and 0.149 for Conscientiousness, all with p-values of 0.575, 0.327, 0.869, 0.847, and 0.596 respectively. In the case of DBP_ER
(%), the rs values are 0.584** for Neuroticism, -0.478* for Extraversion, -0.023 for Openness, -0.271 for Agreeableness, and
-0.275 for Conscientiousness, with corresponding p-values of 0.022, 0.072, 0.934, 0.328, and 0.322.

page.content: For MBP_ER (%), the rs values are 0.526** for Neuroticism, -0.499* for Extraversion, -0.077 for Openness, -0.299 for Agreeableness, and -0.201 for Conscientiousness, with p-values of 0.044, 0.058, 0.784, 0.279, and 0.472. Analyzing PR (%), the rs coefficients are 0.050 for Neuroticism, 0.250 for Extraversion, 0.334 for Openness, 0.200 for Agreeableness, and -0.368 for Conscientiousness, with p-values of 0.859, 0.368, 0.224, 0.474, and 0.177. Finally, examining RPP (bpm × mmHg), the rs values are 0.102 for Neuroticism, 0.059 for Extraversion, -0.011 for Openness, 0.029 for Agreeableness, and -0.122 for Conscientiousness, with p-values of 0.717, 0.834, 0.970, 0.918, and 0.665.
